goal: UR10 builtin SINGLE-cube color-routing pick-place — picks Cube_1 (red) and delivers to Bin_red. Validates color_routing dispatch with raycast workaround using simulate_traversal_check (which is single-cube), avoiding multi-cube measurement issues.
thoughts:
Color-routing minimum viable test:
1) UR10 base + table + pedestal + cube — same as CP-78.
2) Cube_1 = red (semantic_type='color', class_name='red').
3) Two bins: Bin_red at (0.5, -0.30, 0.75), Bin_blue at (0.5, -0.55, 0.75).
4) color_routing dict {'red': '/World/Bin_red', 'blue': '/World/Bin_blue'}.
5) destination_path defaults to Bin_red since cube is red.
6) simulate_traversal_check measures Cube_1 → Bin_red. PASS = cube delivered to red bin.
code:
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.7, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

create_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", prim_type="Xform")
add_reference(prim_path="/World/UR10", reference_path="/mnt/shared_data/isaac-sim-assets-complete-5.0.0/Assets/Isaac/5.0/Collected_Robots/ur10.usd")
teleport_prim(prim_path="/World/UR10", position=[0, 0, 0.75])

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Pedestal", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.875], scale=[0.06, 0.06, 0.075])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Pedestal", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", prim_type="Cube", position=[-0.5, 0.4, 0.975], size=0.05)
for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
    apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", schema_name=api)
bulk_set_attribute(prim_paths=["/World/Cube_1"], attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold", value=0.0)
apply_physics_material(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", material_name="rubber")
set_semantic_label(prim_path="/World/Cube_1", semantic_type="color", class_name="red")

create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin_red", position=[0.5, -0.30, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.15])
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin_blue", position=[0.5, -0.55, 0.75], size=[0.20, 0.20, 0.15])

setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/UR10",
    robot_family="ur10",
    target_source="builtin",
    source_paths=["/World/Cube_1"],
    destination_path="/World/Bin_red",
    color_routing={"red": "/World/Bin_red", "blue": "/World/Bin_blue"},
    end_effector_offset=[0.0, 0.0, 0.02],
)
extension_notes: CP-85 = CP-78 with color_routing on a single cube. Validates that color routing dispatch works with raycast workaround for the simplest case (one cube → one of N bins).
failure_modes: set_semantic_label may need specific schema names — handler reads Semantics_color, Semantics_colour, Semantics_class.
verified_status: build-spec-2026-05-08; form-gate ✓; function-gate ✗ (smaller Bin_red + extra Bin_blue caused descent issue, NOT color_routing — see CP-86 ✓)
